title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Reports Resolved
body:
**Moderation Actions Taken**

We've completed review of today's high-severity reports:

✅ **2 Users Banned**
- @spam_wave_42 — Phishing links distributed across 6 channels
- @toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers

✅ **1 False Positive Dismissed**
- @core_maintainer was mass-reported by brigading users; report dismissed, no action taken

**Report Status:** 3 high-severity reports closed. Remaining medium/low severity reports are under routine review.

We take community safety seriously. Reports are reviewed individually with appropriate action based on evidence.

— Community Operations Team
